mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repositories(id, project_id, repo_url, local_path) VALUES(#{id}, #{projectId}, #{repoUrl}, #{localPath})
mapper.update: MERGE INTO git_commit_logs g USING DUAL ON (g.commit_sha = #{commitSha} AND g.task_id = #{taskId}) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT(commit_sha, repo_id, task_id, message, author, commit_date) VALUES(#{commitSha}, #{repoId}, #{taskId}, #{message}, #{author}, #{commitDate})
mapper.select: SELECT commit_sha, message, author, commit_date FROM git_commit_logs WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY commit_date DESC
